Non concatenative morphology occurs across all roots in roughly this form
{| class="wikitable"
|
|'''Operation'''
|'''Mnemonic name (Aelaki)'''
|'''Form'''
|'''Core meaning'''
|-
|Base
|'''Base'''
|''bhinki‑'' “root”
|C₁V₁C₂V₂C₃
|singular / perfective‑incomplete / positive degree
|-
|Plural
|'''Reduplication'''
|''bhinkibhin'' “two roots”
|C₁V₁'''C₂'''C₂V₂C₃
|partitive plural / imperfective / comparative
|-
|Complete
|'''Umlaut'''
|''bhinkiæ'' “final root”
|C₁'''front‑V₁'''C₂'''front‑V₂'''C₃
|collective / perfective‑completed / superlative
|-
|Negation
|'''Zero‑infix''' /ɸ/
|''bhinki‑f'' “absent root”
|C₁V₁'''f'''C₂V₂C₃
|negation / zero quantity
|}

== Notes ==
Negation form is not present in particles, because particles tend to be 1 syllable long, and as a result too short for the infix to be properly added

== Plural form ==

[[Category:Aelaki]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
